rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Assumptions and guarantees for ports should reference visible feature names or declared constants
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers and named constants when defining range constraints in AGREE contracts
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Range checks in AGREE use boolean helper declarations with comparison expressions
AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes: component types for contracts, implementations for bindings
anti_patterns: Avoid placing port-based assumptions or guarantees in implementation scopes
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts
